observations.text:
Request: actor=Sales Manager; target=Quote v2; action=deliver revised quotation; deadline=2026-07-20; condition=firmware capability confirmed; fallback=use old specification if no conclusion; domains=sales,rd; owner=Sales Ops; object_type=Quote
Blocker: actor=Firmware Lead; target=Firmware capability; blocker=confirmation pending; owner=Firmware Team; deadline=2026-07-12; domains=rd,sales; object_type=FirmwareSpec
Deadline: actor=Customer; target=Quote v2; deadline=2026-07-20; domains=sales; owner=Sales Ops; object_type=Quote

InventoryShortage: actor=Warehouse Planner; target=Part X; blocker=material shortage; owner=Warehouse Team; deadline=2026-07-10; domains=warehouse,production; object_type=InventoryItem

Risk: actor=Sales Director; target=Customer renewal; risk=payment delay may block renewal; escalation=VP Sales; domains=sales,finance; owner=Sales Director; object_type=Opportunity
